tasks.title: Capital of Japan
tasks.description: Answer a concise factual geography question with no extra words.
tasks.input_text: Question: What is the capital of Japan?
tasks.expected_format: Return only the answer in 1-3 words.
tasks.initial_prompt: Answer the question for the user.
hints: The task prefers exact, short answers.

tasks.title: Red Planet
tasks.description: Answer a science fact question briefly and correctly.
tasks.input_text: Question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
hints: The best answer is a single entity.

tasks.title: Support Ticket Extraction
tasks.description: Extract structured fields from a support complaint.
tasks.input_text: Customer email: The AeroSound X2 speaker keeps disconnecting after five minutes. I need a fix before tomorrow's event, so this is urgent.
tasks.expected_format: Return valid JSON only with keys product, issue, urgency.

scoring_rubric.field_coverage: All required keys must be present.
scoring_rubric.value_accuracy: Values should match the source text.

tasks.initial_prompt: Read the message and summarize it.

tasks.title: Invoice Field Parse
tasks.input_text: Invoice note: Client BrightLeaf ordered 3 solar chargers for $120 total. Payment status is pending.
tasks.expected_format: Return valid JSON only with keys client, item, quantity, status.

tasks.title: Ticket Pack Arithmetic
tasks.description: Solve a short arithmetic word problem with numbered reasoning.
tasks.input_text: A team has 24 tickets. It gives 6 tickets to sponsors and sells the rest in packs of 3. How many packs are sold?

steps: Divide the remaining tickets into packs: 18 / 3 = 6.

tasks.expected_format: Return numbered steps followed by 'Final answer: 6'.
hints: The evaluator checks for numbered steps.
A separate final answer line improves score.

tasks.title: Minutes Conversion Math
tasks.description: Follow multiple arithmetic instructions and report the final result clearly.
tasks.input_text: Convert 2 hours and 30 minutes into minutes, add 30, then divide by 3.

steps: Convert 2 hours and 30 minutes into minutes: 150.

tasks.expected_format: Return numbered steps followed by 'Final answer: 60'.

scoring_rubric.format: Require numbered steps and a final answer line.
